_comment: Configuration for the Exodus -> Notion cost reconciler. Secrets (Notion token, optional CoinGecko key) are NOT here - they come from environment variables / GitHub secrets. Safe to edit and commit.

csv._comment: Drop your Exodus 'Export Transactions' CSV(s) here. All *.csv files in this folder are read and merged (de-duplicated by transaction id), so it is fine to keep dropping in fresh full-history exports.

reconcile._comment_start_date: Ignore Exodus payments before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use it the first time so you are not flooded with alerts about old payments you never logged. null = check all history.
reconcile._comment_ignore_currencies: Optional list of asset symbols to skip entirely (e.g. tiny dust transfers).
reconcile._comment_min: Payments worth less than this in USD are ignored (dust / network noise).

matching._comment: A payment counts as 'tracked' if a Total Costs row exists within date_window_days whose USD amount is within EITHER amount_rel_tolerance (fraction) OR amount_abs_tolerance_usd of it. If no amount match but exactly ONE cost row sits within tight_date_window_days, it is flagged as an Amount Mismatch instead of Untracked.

period_check._comment: Coarse backstop: per calendar month, if total USD that left Exodus exceeds total logged in Total Costs by more than BOTH thresholds, raise a Period Gap alert (money left the wallet that is nowhere in the tracker). Only fires when Exodus outflow > tracked, so non-Exodus costs (e.g. card payments) never trigger a false gap.
